Name: Set production env var audit baseline
Notes: Verify all required env vars are present in Vercel production and documented.

Name: Verify signup flow end-to-end
Notes: Test code request, verification, complete signup, and role assignment on production.

Name: Verify login flow end-to-end
Notes: Test successful and failed login paths and session persistence across reloads.

Name: Verify forgot-password flow
Notes: Test request code, resend, confirm reset, and login with new password.

Name: Validate CORS allowlist in production
Notes: Confirm expected origins are allowed and unknown origins are rejected.

Name: Validate API write rate limits
Notes: Exercise hot write endpoints and confirm 429 behavior + retry-after headers.

Name: Confirm standardized API errors
Notes: Ensure client-safe error bodies are returned without leaking internals.

Name: Run auth abuse smoke tests
Notes: Attempt invalid token and role edge cases on protected routes.

Name: Verify Mixpanel core events
Notes: Confirm page_viewed, auth, bookings, and horses events in Mixpanel Live View.

Name: Verify GA4 realtime tracking
Notes: Confirm page views and key traffic in GA4 Realtime report.

Name: Verify Clarity session recording
Notes: Confirm sessions and rage/dead click signals appear after test traffic.

Name: Verify Sentry client error capture
Notes: Trigger browser test error and confirm issue appears with stack trace.

Name: Verify Sentry server error capture
Notes: Trigger API/server error and confirm issue appears with request context.

Name: Configure Sentry alert rules
Notes: Create alerts for new issue, regression, and spike in error rate.

Name: Set on-call notification channel
Notes: Route urgent Sentry alerts to Slack/email and validate delivery.

Name: Run booking creation QA
Notes: Test booking request create/approve/decline/cancel across roles.

Name: Run horse management QA
Notes: Test add/edit/delete horse, photo upload, and session logging.

Name: Run competition and incident QA
Notes: Test create/update/delete and permission checks for competitions/incidents.

Name: Run newsletter and notices QA
Notes: Test subscriber add and send flows with rate-limit behavior.

Name: Check mobile responsive pass
Notes: Smoke test core flows on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.

Name: Set deployment rollback checklist
Notes: Document quick rollback steps and ownership for release day.

Name: Prepare launch-day runbook
Notes: Define monitoring cadence, owners, and incident communication template.

Name: Set post-launch KPI dashboard
Notes: Create a shared dashboard for signups, activation, and key usage metrics.

Name: Create post-launch bug triage board
Notes: Define severity policy and daily bug triage process for week one.

Name: Freeze release candidate branch
Notes: Create launch candidate branch and permit only blocker fixes.
